metadata.description: Comprehensive agent skills collection with AgenticFlow integration

plugins.name: document-skills
plugins.description: Document processing suite: Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and PDF

plugins.name: example-skills
plugins.description: Creative and utility skills: visual design, algorithmic art, internal comms, web testing, artifact building, Slack GIFs, and theme styling

plugins.name: agenticflow-skills
plugins.description: Skills powered by AgenticFlow for cloud-based AI workflows, image generation, and workflow orchestration

plugins.name: content-skills
plugins.description: Content generation: infographics, comics, cover images, article illustrations, and XHS image series

plugins.name: publishing-skills
plugins.description: Social media publishing: X/Twitter, WeChat, and Weibo

plugins.name: utility-skills
plugins.description: Content processing: translation, image compression, URL-to-markdown, markdown formatting and conversion, and text humanization

plugins.name: security-skills
plugins.description: Security analysis: threat modeling, best practices review, and ownership mapping

plugins.name: github-skills
plugins.description: GitHub workflow: address PR comments, fix CI, and quick commit-push-PR flow

plugins.name: media-skills
plugins.description: Media generation: video (Sora), text-to-speech, audio transcription, and screenshots

plugins.name: deploy-skills
plugins.description: Deployment to cloud platforms: Cloudflare, Vercel, Netlify, and Render

plugins.name: notion-skills
plugins.description: Notion integration: knowledge capture, meeting intelligence, research documentation, and spec-to-implementation

plugins.name: dev-skills
plugins.description: Development tools: Jupyter notebooks, Sentry monitoring, Linear project management, web game development, ASP.NET Core, WinUI, Figma design-to-code, ChatGPT Apps, and OpenAI docs
